testcase.name: paginated crawl fetches all pages at controlled rate()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: 5 pages at 3/sec should span >800ms, took 778ms

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: 5 pages at 3/sec should span >800ms, took 778ms at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:38) at app//org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.fail(Assertions.java:138) at app//kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.fail(JUnitSupport.kt:56) at app//kotlin.test.Asserter$DefaultImpls.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:694) at app//kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.assertTrue(JUnitSupport.kt:30) at app//kotlin.test.Asserter$DefaultImpls.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:704) at app//kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.assertTrue(JUnitSupport.kt:30) at app//kotlin.test.AssertionsKt__AssertionsKt.assertTrue(Assertions.kt:44) at app//kotlin.test.AssertionsKt.assertTrue(Unknown Source) at app//com.example.PaginatedCrawlTest$paginated crawl fetches all pages at controlled rate$1.invokeSuspend(PaginatedCrawlTest.kt:57) at app//kotlin.coroutines.jvm.internal.BaseContinuationImpl.resumeWith(ContinuationImpl.kt:34) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.DispatchedTask.run(DispatchedTask.kt:100) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.EventLoopImplBase.processNextEvent(EventLoop.common.kt:263) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.BlockingCoroutine.joinBlocking(Builders.kt:95) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.BuildersKt__BuildersKt.runBlocking(Builders.kt:69) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.BuildersKt.runBlocking(Unknown Source) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.BuildersKt__BuildersKt.runBlocking$default(Builders.kt:47) at app//kotlinx.coroutines.BuildersKt.runBlocking$default(Unknown Source) at app//com.example.PaginatedCrawlTest.paginated crawl fetches all pages at controlled rate(PaginatedCrawlTest.kt:38) at java.base@21.0.10/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base@21.0.10/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base@21.0.10/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: paginated crawl returns valid data on each page()
